slow_news_week.notes: Sam:“Nothing is happening. I've read every trade twice, three group chats are arguing about a festival poster, and that's the whole industry this week. We might have an opportunity to fill the vacuum. I can start a fight, I can place a piece, or I can sit on my hands while someone else takes advantage.”

crisis_retainer.notes: 1. money −40000, executive_mood +5, artist_mood +5→press_momentum +2 | 2. money −15000, reputation +1→press_momentum +1 | 3.  executive_mood −10→ —

own_the_correction.notes: This is a good scenario but the outcomes need to be more extreme (2.5x or so)

the_dossier.notes: This would work better if it was about a specific scenario (artist or some past from the label) - too broad. We could even come up with a few scenarios that get played, but it's the same types of choices. Would be a good way to create more "stories".

awards_whisper_campaign.notes: An artist would feel like the label is supporting her by spending cash. So I would go back to that. This should also be a meeting that pops up to a specific release. Side note - releases should get awards as a achievement? something to work on later.

the_comeback_client.notes: What does this have to do with music?

platform_exclusive_bidding.notes: Should be tied to a release. Should say the artist name and release name. Effects should be 2x

chart_debut_one_hour_window.notes: Artist would LIKE the label support on this. I think it needs the effects 2x and money 4x. I think it needs to mess with artist popularity. Almost like a varience a slim chance the exposure could lead to a negative outcome.
